headline: Will Lankshear
body: Middlesbrough sign Tottenham striker Lankshear. Tottenham striker Will Lankshear signs a five-year contract with Middlesbrough in a deal which could rise to a Boro club-record £20m.
raw_text: Middlesbrough sign Tottenham striker Lankshear. Tottenham striker Will Lankshear signs a five-year contract with Middlesbrough in a deal which could rise to a Boro club-record £20m.
text: Middlesbrough sign Tottenham striker Lankshear. Tottenham striker Will Lankshear signs a five-year contract with Middlesbrough in a deal which could rise to a Boro club-record £20m.
draft_caption:
✅ TRANSFER- WILL LANKSHEAR CONFIRMED PERMANENT TRANSFER FROM TOTTENHAM TO MIDDLESBROUGH.
💰 FEE — £20M
📝 CONTRACT — 5-Year Deal
